comment.en: Geopolitical country, linked to the EU Named Authority List
Qualitative severity level of a risk
A FSCA as defined in MDR
European regulation applicable to a device
Device intended to be totally introduced into the human body or to replace an epithelial surface or the surface of the eye
Regulatory risk classification of a medical device
A medical device or in-vitro diagnostic device as defined by Regulation (EU) 2017/745 or Regulation (EU) 2017/746.
Legal manufacturer of a medical device under MDR
Subclass used in EUDAMED for high-energy active implants such as LVADs
Device whose operation depends on a source of electrical energy or any source of power other than that generated by the human body or gravity
Identified risk associated with a medical device according to IMDRF Adverse Event Terminology
Device intended to be used on one individual during a single procedure
Incident derived by SWRL rule on Class III implantable device with Critical severity risk
IVD intended by the manufacturer to be used by laypersons in a home environment
Medical device intended to be used for the in-vitro examination of specimens derived from the human body
